title: Welcome
body: This short tour walks you through the main parts of the site. Use Next and Back below, or keyboard arrows.

title: Try highlighting
body: Steps can highlight a specific element when you set a CSS selector in tour.json. This demo targets the page’s main heading if it exists.

title: Finish
body: Edit extension/tour.json to match your real layout and copy. You can add steps, change text, and set selectors (or null for a centered tip only).
